name: Vessel Carbon Lighter
summary: The Vessel Carbon is a high-end refillable torch lighter engineered for smooth ignition and dependable performance.
description: The Vessel Carbon is a high-end refillable torch lighter engineered for smooth ignition and dependable performance. Featuring an inverted-ready design and angled flame outlet, it delivers controlled lighting from multiple angles, making it a practical and visually refined accessory for premium retail environments. The Carbon lighter is a standalone, refillable torch compatible with high-quality butane fuel. It is not limited to any specific device range and is suitable for a wide variety of lighting applications. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
